name: Archive Manager
description: Zip/unzip files and folders from the sidebar, plus context menu entries.

name: Database Browser
description: Browse SQLite files or a MongoDB server, with a mode toggle.

name: Git Integration
description: Shows git status/git log for the folder you're browsing.

name: MTG Collection Manager
description: Tracks a Magic: The Gathering card collection via the Scryfall API.

name: Terminal
description: Opens a detached, tabbed terminal window with a real interactive shell.

name: Duplicate File Finder
description: Finds duplicate files by content hash, grouped with wasted-space totals.

name: Disk Usage Visualizer
description: Recursive size breakdown of a folder's immediate children.

name: Checksum Verifier
description: Computes MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256 and checks against a pasted checksum.

name: Batch Rename
description: Find/Replace renaming for a folder's contents, with live preview.
